// LoremasterSettings: Reading order: below this line, every // key is documentation; the next block lists real settings in the same order. Loremaster extends quest points (QP), account-wide tracking, completion bonus XP, repeat loot, achievements, cooldown reduction, /qb notify defaults, optional Harmony equip patches, and BarkeeperParchments contracts. Nested BarkeeperParchments and ParchmentTemplates follow two-band // then values inside each object. Dictionary keys in QuestBonuses, CompletionBonusXpOverrides, and AchievementBonusQPOverrides are case-sensitive quest or threshold keys.
// StandardBaseXpRetentionPercent: Multiplicative base: percent of raw ACE kill/quest XP kept before QP, equipment, etc. (25 = 25% of raw, i.e. -75% vs full vanilla).
// BonusPerQuestPoint: Quest Points factor = 1 + (QP × BonusPerQuestPoint / 100), multiplied with base retention and other terms.
// AugmentXpMultiplier: Multiplicative augment term for /qb and XP (1 = no change).
// ChallengeModeXpMultiplier: GrantXP / luminance chain only (1 = no change). Does not scale stored /qb quest points.
// ChallengeModeQuestPointsMultiplier: While /cm challenge active: if not 1, overrides ChallengeModes QuestPointsMultiplierWhileChallengeActive. If 1, Loremaster uses ChallengeModes value (default 2×) then ChallengeModeXpMultiplier when that is not 1.
// ApplyStandardBaseXpScaleToLuminance: When true, luminance uses the same multiplicative chain as XP; when false, only the QP factor (QuestBonus) applies.
// CooldownReductionPerQuestPoint: Independent of BonusPerQuestPoint: cooldown reduction uses QP × (CooldownReductionPerQuestPoint / 100), capped by QuestCooldownReductionCap.
// CompletionBonusPerQuestPoint: Added to DefaultCompletionBonusXpMultiplier for completion bonus fraction (then × per-quest override).
// DefaultPoints: QP awarded for quests not listed in QuestBonuses; 0 = only explicit QuestBonuses grant QP.
// QuestBonuses: Per-quest QP overrides (case-sensitive internal quest names). 0 = tracked but no QP; unlisted uses DefaultPoints.
// UseAccountWideQuests: When true, QP and XP multiplier use unique quests solved across all characters on the account.
// EnableVitaeCapAchievement: When true, first time a character reaches VitaeCapThreshold vitae, grant VitaeCapBonusQuestPoints extra QP (one time per character).
// VitaeCapThreshold: Vitae fraction (0–1) for the achievement; 0.99 = 99% server cap.
// VitaeCapBonusQuestPoints: Extra QP added to the bonus pool when the vitae achievement fires.
// EnableCompletionBonusXp: Grant one-shot completion bonus XP on each solve; stacks with the ongoing QP multiplier.
// DefaultCompletionBonusXpMultiplier: Flat fraction of next-level XP before the CompletionBonusPerQuestPoint term; 0 = QP-scaled + overrides only.
// CompletionBonusXpOverrides: Per-quest absolute fraction of next-level XP when listed; 0 suppresses. Unlisted uses Default + QP term.
// EnableRepeatQuestPoints: Repeat solves can add QP to the extra pool at most once per quest per RepeatQuestPointCooldownSeconds.
// RepeatQuestPointCooldownSeconds: Seconds between repeat-QP awards for the same quest (default 10h).
// CompactKillTaskMessages: When true, kill-task progress is one line (current/max); when false, vanilla long messages.
// BypassPortalMaxLevelRestriction: When true, portal max-level requirement is bypassed (ACE use_portal_max_level_requirement forced off for that check).
// EnlightenmentBonusPercentPer: When UseEnlightenmentPoolForXpMultiplier is false: (1 + enlightenment × EnlightenmentBonusPercentPer / 100). Ignored when the pool drives the enlight term.
// UseEnlightenmentPoolForXpMultiplier: When true, enlight term is (1 + FakeFloat 11012) from enlightenment /cm quit (level/10000 each); when false, use EnlightenmentBonusPercentPer linear term.
// EnableRepeatSolveLoot: When true, award loot on repeat solves (2nd+) using Loremaster/LootConfig.json (same default pool as BetterLootControl).
// LootConfigPath: Optional path to LootConfig.json; empty = Mods/Loremaster/LootConfig.json.
// EnableAchievementBroadcasts: Broadcast server-wide when an account hits an achievement unique-quest count.
// AchievementThresholds: Account-wide unique quest counts that trigger achievement broadcasts and bonus QP.
// AchievementBonusQPPercent: Bonus QP formula: (AchievementBonusQPPercent / 100) × AchievementBonusQPBase unless overridden.
// AchievementBonusQPBase: Base term for achievement bonus QP before percent (default 10% of 100 = 10 QP).
// AchievementBonusQPOverrides: Per achievement threshold (int key): fixed QP instead of the percent×base formula.
// AchievementBroadcastFormat: Broadcast format: {0} character name, {1} ordinal achievement, {2} bonus QP.
// EnableQuestCooldownReduction: Scale repeat cooldowns using CooldownReductionPerQuestPoint × total QP (capped).
// QuestCooldownReductionCap: Max fraction of cooldown removed (0–1); null = uncapped.
// QuestCooldownReductionOnlyIfMinDeltaE: Only scale MinDelta when world quest MinDelta (seconds) is greater than this; avoids breaking short portal timers. 0 = all quests.
// PermanentFlagQuests: Quest names that skip cooldown reduction (vanilla GetNextSolveTime); case-sensitive.
// NotifyKillXpDefault: Default /qb kill XP notify when the character has never toggled it.
// NotifyQuestXpDefault: Default /qb quest XP lines when unset on the character.
// NotifyKillLuminanceDefault: Default /qb kill luminance notify when unset.
// EnableEquipPostCreation: Harmony: equip post-creation patches (same category style as EmpyreanAlteration).
// BarkeeperParchments: Bartender parchment contracts: cooldown, Town Criers, boards, tier XP bands, templates. Inside BarkeeperParchments: // lines first, then values (same order).
// EnableAccountWideAugments: When true, non-exempt augment purchases are shared across all characters on the same account. Exempt: attribute augs, resist augs, skill-spec augs.
// ChallengeCharactersShareAccountAugmen: When true, challenge mode characters receive account-wide augments immediately. When false, they only get augments on /cm quit.
AchievementBroadcastFormat: [Loremaster] {0} has just completed their {1} unique quest and earned {2} bonus quest points!

BarkeeperParchments.// Enable: Master toggle for barkeeper parchment feature.
BarkeeperParchments.// CooldownSeconds: 0 = disabled. After starting a parchment, Unix-time gate until another can start.
BarkeeperParchments.// TownCrierWeenieClassIds: Town Crier WCIDs used to turn in Explore/Fetch (not Kill) contracts.
BarkeeperParchments.// BartenderContractBoards: Per bartender vendor: WCID and five 0-based template row indices. Each board object: // lines first, then values.
BarkeeperParchments.// TierEasyXpPercentMin: Easy tier: min fraction of level-up XP for contract reward band.
BarkeeperParchments.// TierEasyXpPercentMax: Easy tier: max fraction of level-up XP for contract reward band.
BarkeeperParchments.// TierAverageXpPercentMin: Average tier: min fraction of level-up XP.
BarkeeperParchments.// TierAverageXpPercentMax: Average tier: max fraction of level-up XP.
BarkeeperParchments.// TierChallengingXpPercentMin: Challenging tier: min fraction of level-up XP.
BarkeeperParchments.// TierChallengingXpPercentMax: Challenging tier: max fraction of level-up XP.
BarkeeperParchments.// ParchmentTemplates: Contract templates; each array element is a full ParchmentTemplateSettings object with // lines first, then values (same order).

// EnableAchievementTiers: Track per-character achievement tier (LMInt 11050) gating features in QOL, AutoLoot, and CommonGoals.
// KillsPerQuestEquivalent: Total creature kills (WorldEvents TotalLifetimeKills) equal to one progress point. 100 = 100 kills ≈ 1 quest.
// AchievementTierThresholds: Progress-point thresholds unlocking Tier 1/2/3/4. Progress = questCount + floor(kills / KillsPerQuestEquivalent).
// Momentum: Account-wide momentum pool + optional level parity. Replaces RestedXp. Enabled=false by default while migrating.

Momentum.// Enabled: When true, replaces RestedXp with Momentum + Parity.
Momentum.// AccrualPercentPerHour: Momentum accrued per hour offline as % of next-level requirement (5.0 = 5%/hr).
Momentum.// DecayPercentPerHour: Momentum decayed per hour while ANY character is online (1.0 = 1%/hr).
Momentum.// EnableLevelParity: When true, apply level-parity catch-up/penalty to XP gains.
Momentum.// ParityBonusPerLevelDelta: Below median: +XP multiplier per level away (0.01 = +1% per level).
Momentum.// ParityPenaltyPerLevelDelta: Above median: -XP multiplier per level ahead (0.01 = -1% per level).
Momentum.// ParityMinimumMultiplier: Floor on XP multiplier for above-median players (0.25 = 25% XP floor).
Momentum.// MinLevelForMedian: Only players at or above this level count toward the server median.
Momentum.// MedianScanIntervalMinutes: How often the server median is recalculated.

// LootTierDelay: Delays high spell tiers on creature drops based on killer level.

LootTierDelay.// Enable: When true, creature loot spell tiers are clamped based on the killer's character level.
LootTierDelay.// Thresholds: Ordered list of level thresholds. Each entry: MinLevel = minimum player level, MaxTier = highest treasure profile tier allowed for spells. Evaluated from highest MinLevel downward.

Thresholds.// MinLevel: Minimum player level to unlock MaxTier.
Minimum player level to unlock MaxTier.
Minimum player level to unlock MaxTier.
Minimum player level to unlock MaxTier.
Minimum player level to unlock MaxTier.
Minimum player level to unlock MaxTier.
Minimum player level to unlock MaxTier.
Minimum player level to unlock MaxTier.

// QuestPointLotteryContributionPercent: Fraction of repeatQB earned that gets added to the LeyLineLedger lottery pool. 10.0 = 10%. Players do NOT lose QP; this is a server-side match.
